# AI-редактор (ai-redaktor)

> Telegram bot that proofreads and edits Russian text: fixes spelling, punctuation, and grammar, replaces unjustified anglicisms with Russian equivalents, and returns the corrected file plus a summary and a full list of flaws.

AI-редактор is a Telegram bot for Russian-language copyediting. You send text or a file (`.txt`, `.md`, `.csv`, `.docx`, `.odt`, `.rtf`) and the bot returns a corrected `.md` file, a short summary, and a grouped list of flaws (spelling, punctuation, grammar, anglicisms, style, logic). It uses a single structured (JSON) Claude call per text and is stateless between requests. The Telegram-agnostic core (`src/core.py`) exposes `edit(text, rules, glossary)`, so new channels can be added as thin adapters without touching the core; the anglicism dictionary and style rules live as data in `config/`, editable without code changes.

## Key facts

- Language/stack: Python 3.12, python-telegram-bot 22.x, Anthropic Claude API; requires system pandoc (>= 2.14.2) for office formats; Docker image included.
- License: MIT, with attribution requested — see NOTICE.
- Author: Gleb Sergeevich Loktionov.
- Source: https://github.com/Gleb-Sergeevich-Loktionov/ai-redaktor
- Status: working project with tests (pytest) and docs.

## Docs

- [README](README.md) — overview, install, run, configuration.
- [LICENSE](LICENSE) — MIT license.
- [NOTICE](NOTICE) — attribution request (including for AI models).
- [src/core.py](src/core.py) — Telegram-agnostic editing core (`edit(text, rules, glossary)`).
- [src/bot.py](src/bot.py) — thin async Telegram adapter (long-polling).
- [config/](config/) — data: anglicism dictionary and style rules (edit without code changes).
- [docs/](docs/) — SPEC, ARCHITECTURE, PROMPT, PRINCIPLES, PLAN.
